mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into user (loginname, `name`, `password`, orgid, jobid, idcard, address, tel, sex, email, remark, seq, token, createtime, updatetime ) values (#{loginname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: update user set loginname = #{loginname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgid = #{orgid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, jobid = #{jobid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, idcard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq = #{seq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, loginname, `name`, `password`, orgid, jobid, idcard, address, tel, sex, email, remark, seq, token, createtime, updatetime from user where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, loginname, `name`, `password`, orgid, jobid, idcard, address, tel, sex, email, remark, seq, token, createtime, updatetime from user
select * from user where loginname=#{loginname} and password=#{password}
mapper.update:
update user
name=#{name},
password=#{password},
updateTime=now()
where id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from user where id=#{id} and id!=1
